recommendations.title: The Quack

recommendations.title: On the Fringe
recommendations.overview: A day in the life of Azucena, who is running out of time to keep herself and her family from being evicted; Rafael, a lawyer who sets out to reunite a mother with her daughter; and Teodora, a sick old woman who searches for her long-lost son before i

recommendations.title: Guns for San Sebastian
recommendations.overview: Leon Alastray is an outlaw who has been given sanctuary by Father John, whom he then escorts to the village of San Sebastian. The village is deserted, with its cowardly residents hiding in the hills from Indians, who regularly attack the village and

recommendations.title: The Knight Before Christmas
recommendations.overview: A medieval English knight is magically transported to present day where he ends up falling for a high school science teacher.

recommendations.title: Black Death
recommendations.overview: As the plague decimates medieval Europe, rumours circulate of a village immune from the plague. There is talk of a necromancer who leads the village and is able to raise the dead. A fearsome knight joined by a cohort of soldiers and a young monk are

recommendations.title: Family Pack
recommendations.overview: When an old card game comes to life, a family jumps back in time to a medieval village where they must unmask werewolves to secure their return home.

recommendations.title: Babette's Feast
recommendations.overview: A French housekeeper with a mysterious past brings quiet revolution in the form of one exquisite meal to a circle of starkly pious villagers in late 19th century Denmark.

recommendations.title: My Rainy Days
recommendations.overview: Because of her past, 17-year-old Rio lives her days filling the emptiness in her heart with money—until one day, she meets a university professor named Kouki and falls in love.

recommendations.title: Call Me by Your Name
recommendations.overview: In the summer of 1983, a 17-year-old Elio spends his days in his family's villa in Italy. One day Oliver, a graduate student, arrives to assist Elio's father, a professor of Greco-Roman culture. Soon, Elio and Oliver discover a summer that will alter

recommendations.title: Trapped
recommendations.overview: A man gets stuck in an empty high rise without food, water or electricity.
